sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47750" key="qalassobraxh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θᾰλασσο-βρᾰχής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n47750.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">soaked in brine</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:8:12:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.12.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
